title: Sum
description:
Consider an $N$-element strictly increasing integer sequence $A$ and an integer $S$.

Write a program to count the number of pairs of elements of $A$ whose sum is $S$.
input: The first line of input contains $N$ and $S$, the length of the sequence and the required sum ($1 \le N \le 100\,000$, $0 \le S \le 2\,000\,000$). The following $N$ lines contain elements of the sequence, one element $A_i$ ($0 \le A_i \le 1\,000\,000$) on each line. The elements are distinct and ordered increasingly.
output: The only line of output should contain the number of pairs that consist of two distinct elemets of the sequence and sum to $S$.
source: Olympiad, Estonian Informatics Olympiad, 2018-19, Preliminary Round
